compressed_context:
CLAIM: INTERNATIONAL-LEGAL-REGIME EQUIPPED TO RESPOND TO EVER-MORE PRESSING GLOBAL CLIMATE-NEEDS  
INTRANAL COMMUNICATION: EU ↔ EUROPEAN-PARLIAMENT ∧ COUNCIL ∧ ECONOMIC-AND-SOCIAL-COMMITTEE ∧ COMMITTEE-OF-THE-REGIONS  
CITE: AN-EU-STRATEGY-ON-ADAPTATION-TO-CLIMATE-CHANGE [COM:2013.216:F] DATE:2013-04-16 P.5  
COMMISSION: ADOPTS UPDATED-STRATEGY DATE:2015-10-22  
MODEL: EU’S PROGRESSIVE-CLIMATE-STANCE SERVES AS MODEL ∧ POLICY-REFERENCE FOR GLOBAL LAW-DEVELOPMENT  
EU-CLIMATE-LEADERSHIP → INSTITUTIONS CONTROL ACTIONS ∧ INFLUENCE EMISSION-REDUCTION TECHNOLOGIES  
EU-REPUTATION AS RELIABLE-PARTNER → AMBITIOUS-EMISSION-TARGETS ∧ NORMATIVE-PRESSURE ON USA ∧ CHINA ∧ GERMANY
